OPENCTI_URL.description: The base URL of the OpenCTI instance.

OPENCTI_TOKEN.description: The API token to connect to OpenCTI.

CONNECTOR_SCOPE.description: The MIME type scope for PDF file exports.

CONNECTOR_LOG_LEVEL.description: The minimum level of logs to display.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_PRIMARY_COLOR.description: Primary color for the PDF output (hex format, e.g., #ff8c00).

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_SECONDARY_COLOR.description: Secondary color for the PDF output (hex format, e.g., #000000).

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_ADDRESS_LINE_1.description: First line of company address (e.g., company name).

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_ADDRESS_LINE_2.description: Second line of company address (e.g., street address).

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_ADDRESS_LINE_3.description: Third line of company address (e.g., city, state, country).

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_PHONE_NUMBER.description: Company phone number for the PDF footer.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_EMAIL.description: Company email for the PDF footer.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_COMPANY_WEBSITE.description: Company website URL for the PDF footer.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_INDICATORS_ONLY.description: If true, only include observables that have indicator status in the report.

EXPORT_REPORT_PDF_DEFANG_URLS.description: If true, replace http with hxxp in URL observables for safe sharing.
